settings.title: Configuration
settings.description: Configure here your credentials for WhatsApp Meta API. For any questions, you can refer to the 'Setup Guide'.
settings.access_token_hint: Generate this token in Meta Business Settings > System Users. It never expires.
settings.phone_id_hint: Found in Meta App > Use Cases > Customize > API Setup
settings.verify_token_hint: A secret string without spaces used to verify the webhook on Meta and for bot registration (e.g. my_homey_token)
settings.groq_api_key_hint: GroqCloud API key (console.groq.com). Required for transcribing voice messages via Whisper.
settings.webhook_url_hint: Copy this URL and paste it in the Meta Developer Portal as the Callback URL.
settings.error_verify_token_spaces: The Verify Token cannot contain spaces.
settings.users_description: Here you can see all authorized phone numbers to use the bot. You can assign a name to each contact and remove unauthorized numbers.
settings.users_empty: No users registered yet. Send the /register command to the bot to register.
settings.users_delete_confirm: Remove this number from the authorized list?
settings.voice_description: Configure API credentials for voice message transcription. For any questions, you can refer to the 'Setup Guide'.
settings.action_error_both_recipients: Please fill ONLY one recipient field (either Contact or Number).
settings.action_error_no_recipient: Please fill AT LEAST one recipient field (Contact or Number).
settings.guide_part1_step1: Go to developers.facebook.com and log in with your Facebook account.
settings.guide_part1_step2: Click 'My Apps' in the top-right corner, then 'Create App'.
settings.guide_part1_step3: Under Use Cases, select 'Connect with customers via WhatsApp'.
settings.guide_part1_step4: Link the app to a Business Portfolio (you can create one following the wizard — it's free).
settings.guide_part1_step5: Once done, go to 'Use Cases' in the left menu and click 'Customize' on the WhatsApp card.
settings.guide_part1_step6: Open 'API Setup' in the left menu and note your Phone Number ID.
settings.guide_part2_step1: Go to business.facebook.com/settings and log in if needed.
settings.guide_part2_step2: In the left menu under 'Users', choose 'System Users' and click 'Add'.
settings.guide_part2_step3: Give the user a name (e.g. HomeyBot), choose the Admin role and click 'Create System User'.
settings.guide_part2_step4: Click the three-dot menu (⋯) next to the user and choose 'Assign Assets'. Select your app, grant Full Control and save by clicking 'Assign Assets' at the bottom-right.
settings.guide_part2_step5: Click 'Generate Token' and follow the guided wizard. When asked to assign permissions, select 'whatsapp_business_messaging' and 'whatsapp_business_management'.
settings.guide_part2_step6: Copy the token immediately — it will only be shown once.
settings.guide_part3_title: Part 3: Configure Homey and the Webhook
settings.guide_part3_step1: Go back to the Configuration page in the Homey app settings and fill in the Token and Phone Number ID.
settings.guide_part3_step2: From the Configuration page, copy the Webhook URL and set a Verify Token of your choice (you will need it both to complete the authentication process on Meta and later to register with the bot). Once done, save the settings.
settings.guide_part3_step3: Go back to your Meta App page -> 'Use Cases' -> 'Customize' -> 'Configuration' and scroll to the Webhook section.
settings.guide_part3_step4: Paste the Webhook URL as the 'Callback URL' and enter your Verify Token. Then click 'Verify and Save'.
settings.guide_part3_step5: Once verification is complete, go back to the 'Configuration' menu and enable the subscription for the 'messages' webhook field.
settings.guide_part4_step1: In your Meta App -> 'Use Cases' -> 'Customize' -> 'API Setup'.
settings.guide_part4_step2: Generate a temporary token (button in the top-right corner). It expires in 24h and is only needed for this step.
settings.guide_part4_step3: In the 'To' dropdown (Step 1), select your personal phone number (add and verify it if not present).
settings.guide_part4_step5: You will receive a 'Hello World' message on WhatsApp. The bot is now active, but you must register before using it.
settings.guide_part4_step6: Reply to the welcome message by sending /register [secret_code] to the bot, where secret_code is the Verify Token you chose in Part 3.
settings.guide_part4_step7: The bot will reply with a confirmation message and will finally be ready to use!
settings.guide_part_voice_step1: Go to console.groq.com and log in or create a free account.
settings.guide_part_voice_step2: In the top-right corner, select 'API Keys'.
settings.guide_part_voice_step3: Click 'Create API Key', give it a name (e.g. HomeyBot), and copy it (it will be shown only once).
settings.guide_part_voice_step4: Go back to the Homey app settings, open the 'Voice Messages' section, paste the key, and save.

bot.registration_required:
You are not authorized to use this Bot. To register you need to know the *secret code* (if you don't know it contact the Bot administrator). Once you have the secret code reply to this chat with the command:

*/register [secret_code]*
bot.registration_success:
Registration successful!
*Now you can use the Bot to control your smart home!*
bot.invalid_token: Invalid security code. If you don't know the security code *contact the Bot administrator* and try again.
bot.voice_transcription_error: ❌ I could not understand your voice message. Please try again or send me a text message instead.
bot.unsupported_message_type: ❌ This type of message is not supported. Please send a text or voice message.
bot.trigger_error: ❌ An error occurred while processing your message. Please try again.
